digest.en: US and Iranian envoys are set to travel for talks, as Tehran's foreign minister meets with Pakistani officials in Islamabad. Meanwhile, the US has imposed sanctions on a Chinese refinery for buying Iranian oil and frozen $344 million in Iran-linked cryptocurrency. The US has also deployed a destroyer to the region.
digest.hi: लेबनान के साथ युद्धविराम के बावजूद इस्राइली सेना और हिजबुल्ला के बीच हमले जारी हैं। कई शहरों पर हुए हमलों में कई लोगों की मौत हुई है। IDF के हमले में गाजा में 12 लोगों की मौत हुई, जिस पर अमेरिकी राष्ट्रपति डोनाल्ड ट्रंप ने टिप्पणी की।

articles.title: US-Israel-Iran War Ceasefire News Live Updates: US ups pressure on Iran, deploys destroyer ship to
articles.summary: The US deployed a destroyer ship to Hormuz as Iran peace talks began in Pakistan. US-Israel-Iran War Ceasefire News Live Updates: US ups pressure on Iran, deploys destroyer ship to Hormuz as Aragchi arrives for peace talks in Pak The Times of India.

articles.title: US Iran War News Live Updates: Tehran’s FM in Islamabad; US says envoys to travel for talks
articles.summary: Tehran's foreign minister arrived in Islamabad for talks as US envoys prepared to travel. US Iran War News Live Updates: Tehran’s FM in Islamabad; US says envoys to travel for talks.

articles.title: China acquired capacity to build 50 nuclear power reactors simultaneously: Official report
articles.summary: China can build 50 nuclear power reactors at the same time, according to a report. China’s total installed nuclear power capacity has reached 125 million kilowatts, ranking first globally, State-run CCTV said, quoting the China Nuclear Energy Association report.

articles.title: US imposes sanctions on Chinese 'teapot' refinery for buying Iranian oil
articles.summary: The US imposed sanctions on Hengli Petrochemical for buying Iranian oil. The Treasury Department targeted Hengli Petrochemical (Dalian) Refinery, which it said is one of Iran's largest customers of crude oil and petroleum products.

articles.title: US envoys will head to Pakistan on Saturday for fresh Iran talks
articles.summary: US envoys will travel to Pakistan on Saturday for fresh Iran talks. Live updates: US envoys will head to Pakistan on Saturday for fresh Iran talks CNN.

articles.title: U.S. won't renew Iranian, Russian oil waivers: Bessent
articles.summary: The U. S. has decided not to renew waivers for Iranian and Russian oil imports, a move that comes amid heightened tensions over the U. S.-Israeli conflict in Iran and the closure of the Strait of Hormuz. The decision is set to impact global energy markets.

articles.title: 3 simple exercises to keep your feet pain-free
articles.summary: Simple foot exercises can ease and prevent discomfort. These exercises involve a few basic movements that can be done at home. It can be incredibly uncomfortable. But a few simple movements can ease and prevent it.

articles.title: Europe's Nato allies push back at reported US threat to Spain
articles.summary: European Nato allies have pushed back against a reported U. S. threat to Spain, marking a further deterioration in relations between Europe and the U. S. The move has sparked concerns about the future of the alliance.

articles.title: As U.S. re-arms during Iran ceasefire, long-term concerns emerge about advanced munitions supplies
articles.summary: The U. S. is re-arming during a ceasefire in Iran, raising long-term concerns about the supply of advanced munitions. This move has sparked worries about the potential for future conflicts and the implications for regional stability.

articles.title: Tehran’s FM in Islamabad; US says envoys to travel for talks
articles.summary: Israeli air strikes and tank shelling in Gaza have killed at least 12 Palestinians, including six police officers. The violence has led to a visit from Tehran's foreign minister to Islamabad, with the U. S. announcing that envoys will travel for talks.

articles.title: US freezes US$344 million in Iran-linked crypto, says Treasury chief Bessent
articles.summary: The US Treasury froze $344 million in Iran-linked cryptocurrency. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said a waiver for Iranian oil at sea won't be renewed. US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent also said that a renewal of the one-time waiver for Iranian oil at sea is totally off the table.

articles.title: Why the IEA chief believes the global oil market will never return to normal
articles.summary: IEA chief Fatih Birol believes the global oil market has changed forever. He thinks the market won't return to pre-pandemic norms. Why the IEA chief believes the global oil market will never return to normal.

articles.title: Trump's envoys Witkoff and Kushner to fly to Pakistan for Iran talks
articles.summary: US envoys Witkoff and Kushner are flying to Pakistan for potential Iran talks. Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi is already in Pakistan. Iran says its Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi is already in Pakistan but that there is no meeting planned between Iran and the US.

articles.title: China car giant BYD says it can thrive without US
articles.summary: China's BYD, a major car manufacturer, says it can thrive without the US market. The company is positioning itself to benefit from the global shift to cleaner fuels. With the price of fuel rising China's BYD says it is positioning itself to benefit from the global shift away from fossil fuels.

articles.title: UN official speaks to CNN on situation in Gaza after truce
articles.summary: A UN official spoke to CNN about the situation in Gaza following a truce. The official's comments come after a recent escalation in the region. UN official speaks to CNN on situation in Gaza after truce CNN.

articles.title: Israel continues attacks on Lebanon despite extension of ceasefire
articles.summary: Israeli forces killed six Hezbollah fighters in southern Lebanon. This exchange of fire occurred despite an extended ceasefire. Israeli forces killed six Hezbollah fighters in an exchange of fire in the area of Bint Jbeil, southern Lebanon.

articles.title: Eric Garcetti discusses modern approaches to peacemaking at UCLA event
articles.summary: Eric Garcetti discussed modern peacemaking approaches at a UCLA event. The former Los Angeles mayor shared his insights on conflict resolution. Eric Garcetti discusses modern approaches to peacemaking at UCLA event Daily Bruin.

articles.title: How Rafael Grossi Would Lead the United Nations: Three Interview Takeaways
articles.summary: Rafael Grossi discussed his potential leadership of the United Nations in an interview with the Council on Foreign Relations. He outlined his vision for the organization. How Rafael Grossi Would Lead the United Nations: Three Interview Takeaways Council on Foreign Relations.

articles.title: US, Iran Prepare For 2nd Round Of Talks In Pak Without Vance, Ghalibaf
articles.summary: The US has confirmed that two key officials will fly to Pakistan tomorrow for talks with Iran. The talks aim to address the ongoing conflict. US Confirms Talks With Iran, 2 Key Officials To Fly To Pak Tomorrow.

articles.title: India Is "Top-Tier Security Partner": Australian Envoy To NDTV
articles.summary: Australia's envoy to India described India as a "top-tier security partner" on NDTV, highlighting the significance of India in Australia's National Defence Strategy. This underscores growing strategic ties between the two nations.

articles.title: Israeli attacks on Lebanon may violate international law, UN warns
articles.summary: The UN warned that Israeli attacks on Lebanon may violate international law. Israeli attacks on Lebanon may violate international law, UN warns Al Jazeera.

articles.summary: संयुक्त राष्ट्र महासभा की अध्यक्ष एनालेना बेयरबॉक अगले हफ्ते नई दिल्ली का दौरा करेंगी। वह भारत की मुरीद हैं और इस दौरान उच्च स्तर पर बातचीत करेंगी। UN: संयुक्त राष्ट्र महासभा की अध्यक्ष एनालेना बेयरबॉक अगले हफ्ते करेंगी नई दिल्ली का दौरा, भारत की हैं मुरीद Amar Ujala।

articles.summary: डोनाल्ड ट्रंप की विवादित पोस्ट के बाद ईरान ने भारत का समर्थन किया है. ट्रंप ने भारत और चीन को 'धरती पर नरक' बताया था. कांग्रेस ने ट्रंप की टिप्पणी पर भारत की प्रतिक्रिया को 'बेहद कमज़ोर' बताया है.

articles.summary: भारत ने संयुक्त राष्ट्र में कहा कि सुरक्षा परिषद के ढांचे में तत्काल सुधार जरूरी है. यह वर्तमान वैश्विक परिदृश्य की मांग है. भारत ने संयुक्त राष्ट्र सुरक्षा परिषद में सुधार की आवश्यकता पर जोर दिया.

articles.title: 23 अप्रैल, 2026 को विश्व आर्थिक समाचारों की मुख्य बातें
articles.summary: विश्व आर्थिक समाचारों में 23 अप्रैल, 2026 को कई महत्वपूर्ण घटनाएं हुईं। इनमें विभिन्न देशों की आर्थिक नीतियों और वैश्विक बाजारों की गतिविधियों पर अपडेट शामिल हैं। 23 अप्रैल, 2026 को विश्व आर्थिक समाचारों की मुख्य बातें Vietnam. vn।

articles.title: 'ट्रंप जब चाहेंगे तब खत्म होगा युद्ध , 3-5 दिन की डेडलाइन की खबरें गलत', पश्चिम एशिया संघर्ष पर
articles.summary: व्हाइट हाउस ने कहा है कि पश्चिम एशिया में संघर्ष को समाप्त करने के लिए कोई निश्चित समयसीमा नहीं है। राष्ट्रपति डोनाल्ड ट्रंप ने कहा है कि वह जब चाहेंगे तब युद्ध को खत्म करेंगे और 3-5 दिन की डेडलाइन की खबरें गलत हैं।

articles.title: ईरान पर अमेरिका-इज़रायल हमलों का 54वां दिन: संघर्षविराम के बीच अविश्वास, हमले जारी और कूटनीति
articles.summary: अमेरिका और इज़रायल के हमलों के 54वें दिन, ईरान में संघर्षविराम के बीच अविश्वास और हमले जारी हैं। कूटनीतिक प्रयास जारी हैं लेकिन स्थिति अनिश्चित बनी हुई है। ईरान और अमेरिका के बीच तनाव कम होने के संकेत नहीं मिल रहे हैं।
